headline: Why soccer fans are choosing Canada and Mexico for the World Cup
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferre join Josh Lipton on Market Domination to discuss a growing World Cup travel trend: fans choosing to attend matches in Canada and Mexico instead of the United States.

headline: CEO Brian Chesky Just Sold More Than $24 Million in Airbnb Stock. Should Investors Follow Suit?
summary: Given the sheer magnitude of the numbers, it's easy to get nervous, but reviewing the details provides important context.
